results.comment_text:
@user1:
I think that this should generate an error, since `T` is not in scope here. If this seems unrelated, you can create an issue about this (and add a TODO comment here).
results.test_code:
# AUTO-GENERATED by split_acceptance_tests.py
# Each original test function was split into one function per top-level
# assertion so pytest reports per-check pass/fail counts.
import re

def test_type_alias_runtime_expression_todo_comment_added__a1():
    source_path = '/workspace/test-data/unit/check-generics.test'
    with open(source_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        source = f.read()
    required_todo = '# TODO: fix https://github.com/python/mypy/issues/7084.'
    assert required_todo in source, f"Expected the TODO comment to be present in {source_path!r} to document the known issue:\n{required_todo!r}\nThis should be added directly above the problematic 'ff = SameNode[T](1, 1)' line."

def test_type_alias_runtime_expression_todo_comment_added__a2():
    source_path = '/workspace/test-data/unit/check-generics.test'
    with open(source_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        source = f.read()
    required_todo = '# TODO: fix https://github.com/python/mypy/issues/7084.'
    case_header = '[case testGenericTypeAliasesRuntimeExpressionsInstance]'
    start = source.find(case_header)
    assert start != -1, f'Expected to find test case header {case_header!r} in {source_path!r}'

def test_type_alias_runtime_expression_todo_comment_added__a3():
    source_path = '/workspace/test-data/unit/check-generics.test'
    with open(source_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        source = f.read()
    required_todo = '# TODO: fix https://github.com/python/mypy/issues/7084.'
    case_header = '[case testGenericTypeAliasesRuntimeExpressionsInstance]'
    start = source.find(case_header)
    next_case = source.find('\n[case ', start + 1)
    case_block = source[start:] if next_case == -1 else source[start:next_case]
    pattern = re.compile('SameNode\\s*=\\s*Node\\[T,\\s*T\\][\\s\\S]*?#\\s*TODO:\\s*fix\\s+https://github\\.com/python/mypy/issues/7084\\.[\\s\\S]*?ff\\s*=\\s*SameNode\\[T\\]\\(1,\\s*1\\)', re.MULTILINE)
    assert pattern.search(case_block), "Expected, within [case testGenericTypeAliasesRuntimeExpressionsInstance], the TODO comment to appear between the 'SameNode = Node[T, T]' alias definition and the 'ff = SameNode[T](1, 1)' line."

from typing import Generic, Callable, TypeVar, Iterator

T = TypeVar('T')

class Box(Generic[T]):
    @classmethod
    def wrap(cls, generator: Callable[[], T]) -> Box[T]: ...

class IteratorBox(Box[Iterator[T]]): ...

@IteratorBox.wrap  # E: Argument 1 to "wrap" of "Box" has incompatible type "Callable[[], int]"; expected "Callable[[], Iterator[<nothing>]]"
def g() -> int:
    ...

[case testGenericClassMethodInGenericFunction]
from typing import Generic, TypeVar
T = TypeVar('T')
S = TypeVar('S')

class C(Generic[T]):
    @classmethod
    def get(cls) -> T: ...

def func(x: S) -> S:
    return C[S].get()
